title: rosa carolina var. grandiflora
intro: Rosa carolina var. grandiflora, also known as the Carolina rose, is a type of flowering shrub native to the southeastern United States. It is a variant of the Rosa carolina species, characterized by its large, fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa carolina var. grandiflora include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and potentially aiding in wound healing, with herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves being used to harness its medicinal properties.
